commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f16bc6a3b49d63efb89f507a3c003ce4e14edca6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional Feishu runtime access, guards several Feishu runtime reads, and threads the active channel runtime into reply dispatch.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +17. Total +40 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main can receive `channelRuntime` and still later call the global Feishu runtime store, whose `getRuntime()` throws before initialization. I did not establish a live Feishu reproduction in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human/contributor follow-up because automation cannot supply the required external Feishu behavior proof, and the branch also has a concrete type-check repair before merge.

target.title: #92595: fix(feishu): handle uninitialized runtime gracefully on inbound messages
